bead.title: Add beads-archive collection with transparent read-through (ADR-004 step 2)
bead.description:
Build on the named-collection abstraction to add a 'beads-archive' collection backed by .ddx/beads-archive.jsonl. Update bead reads (ddx bead list/show/ready/blocked, ddx work queue scan) so they transparently see archived beads when looked up by id, but treat the active 'beads' file as the queue source for ready/blocked computation. Archive remains append-only for normal commands; only the archive command (separate bead) writes there.

References: ADR-004 §Collection Model. Depends on ddx-2f453147.
bead.acceptance: 1. .ddx/beads-archive.jsonl is recognized as a valid bead collection. 2. ddx bead show <id> finds beads in either active or archive. 3. ddx bead list has a --include-archive flag (or equivalent) and the default behavior is documented. 4. ddx bead ready / blocked still operate only on the active collection (archive entries are closed and irrelevant). 5. ddx work / agent execute-loop ignores archive when picking next work. 6. New tests cover read-through for show, and active-only behavior for ready/blocked.
